projectDescription: A supercharged localStorage wrapper that handles rich type serialization, key expiration with TTL, namespace isolation, and Standard Schema validation.
keyFeatures: Store any JavaScript type including Set, Map, Date, RegExp, BigInt, and circular references via devalue
TTL and absolute expiration timestamps with lazy cleanup on read
Namespace isolation via configurable prefix and separator
Standard Schema validation (Zod, Valibot, ArkType) on read
Works with localStorage, sessionStorage, or any Storage-compatible backend
In-memory storage implementation for tests and SSR
Pluggable serializer — swap devalue for superjson or plain JSON
Core entry point (greatstorage/core) for tree-shaking devalue out of bundles
ESM and CJS dual builds with full TypeScript types
Scoped clear() — only removes greatstorage entries in the current namespace
publicApiSurface: GreatStorage.getItem<T>(key: string, options: GetOptions<T>): T | null
GreatStorage.setItem<T>(key: string, value: T, options?: StorageOptions): void
GreatStorage.getOrInit<T>(key: string, factory: () => T, options?: StorageOptions): T
GreatStorage.updateItem<T>(key: string, updater: (value: T | null) => T, options?: StorageOptions): T
